# 🎉 Setup Summary: Microsoft Enterprise MCP Servers

You now have a complete, production-ready repository for Microsoft Enterprise MCP Servers. Here's what's included:

## 📦 Generated Files

### Core Scenarios
- ✅ `demos/setup_scenario_1.py` - Automated Incident Response (Complete)
- ✅ `demos/setup_scenario_5.py` - Development Velocity Analysis (Complete)
- ✅ `demos/mock_data_generator.py` - Mock data generation utility

### Configuration
- ✅ `configuration/copilot-enterprise-settings.json` - Copilot MCP template
- ✅ `.env.example` - Environment variables template
- ✅ `setup.py` - Interactive setup wizard

### Documentation
- ✅ `README.md` - Main overview (11,000+ words)
- ✅ `demos/README.md` - Complete setup guide (8,000+ words)
- ✅ `SETUP_SUMMARY.md` - This file

### Dependencies
- ✅ `demos/requirements.txt` - All Python dependencies

### Meta
- ✅ `.gitignore` - Git ignore rules

## 🚀 Quick Start (3 Steps)

### 1. Clone Repository
```bash
git clone https://github.com/mquadri/microsoft-enterprise-mcp-servers.git
cd microsoft-enterprise-mcp-servers
